proposed_relations.description: 60 ft wide bus lane section on 34th Street as part of SBS design

evidence_refs.source_quote: 60 ft wide section: East of Third Ave West of Ninth Ave

rationale: Block p007_c0002 appears under the '34th St SBS Design: Overview' heading, explicitly framing the 60 ft bus lane section as part of the 34th Street SBS project design. The project_34th-st-sbs-2012 record includes this source and describes the project as including bus lanes.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 60 ft wide section: East of Third Ave West of Ninth Ave

quarantine.note: Cited block text '60 ft wide section: East of Third Ave West of Ninth Ave' is purely a geographical description. It does not mention SBS, bus lanes, or the 34th Street SBS project. The relation depends entirely on the heading context ('34th St SBS Design: Overview') which is not in the cited block. Co-occurrence in a document is not a relation.

proposed_relations.description: Bus bulbs and loading zones as part of 34th Street SBS design

rationale: Blocks p009_c0001 ('Bus Bulb') and p009_c0005 ('Loading Zone') appear on page 9 within the 34th Street SBS design pages of the presentation, alongside offset bus lane labels. The project_34th-st-sbs-2012 record lists this source and describes the project as including bus bulbs and loading zones.

quarantine.note: Cited blocks are bare labels: 'Bus Bulb' and 'Loading Zone'. Neither states any connection to the 34th Street SBS project or any project. The relation is inferred solely from these labels appearing on a design page within an SBS presentation. Co-occurrence in a document is not a relation.

proposed_relations.description: MTA Bus Time real-time bus location system implemented on M34 as part of the 34th Street SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Real time bus location information system • Implemented on M34, with expansion citywide

rationale: Block p005_c0002 appears under the 'MTA Bus Time' heading within the 34th Street SBS presentation, explicitly stating the system was 'Implemented on M34'. The M34 is the 34th Street bus route which the SBS project serves. The project_34th-st-sbs-2012 record includes this source.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Real time bus location information system • Implemented on M34, with expansion citywide

quarantine.note: Cited block describes a citywide system ('Implemented on M34, with expansion citywide') that replaced a prior 34th St pilot ('Replaces Clever Devices 34 th St. pilot project'). The block does not state that MTA Bus Time is a treatment component of the 34th Street SBS project. It is an MTA-wide real-time information system deployed on multiple routes, not an SBS-specific treatment. The connection relies on the document being an SBS presentation — co-occurrence in a document is not a relation.
